meta.note: Cambridge B2 story tasks. Each = {id, title, opening (the sentence the student MUST begin with), prompt (task wording), mustInclude[] (the two required content elements), points[]}. The 'opening' is shown as a prominent quoted band. Fill 'opening' with the exact given first line.

questions.title: The Postman
questions.opening: When he saw the postman coming up to his door, Matt ran to open it.
questions.prompt: Your story must begin with this sentence. Write for a school magazine for teenagers.
points: Continue from the given line — why is Matt so eager?
Bring in the mobile phone and build what happens
Introduce the new friend and resolve the story

questions.title: The Diving Lesson
questions.opening: It was Tom's first deep-sea diving lesson and he was quite nervous.
questions.prompt: Your story must begin with this sentence. Write for an English-language magazine for teenagers.
points: Continue from the given line — set the underwater scene
Bring in the shark and build the tension
Introduce the photograph and resolve the story

questions.title: The Mountain Trek
questions.opening: Jack and Pedro were trekking through the mountains on the first day of their holidays.
questions.prompt: Your story must begin with this sentence. Write for the school English magazine.
points: Continue from the given line — set the mountain scene
Bring in the black clouds and the danger
Find the cave and resolve the story

questions.title: The Flight
questions.opening: Feeling slightly nervous, Emma walked up the steps and onto the plane.
questions.prompt: Your story must begin with this sentence. Write for an English-language website for young people.
points: Continue from the given line — set the scene on the plane
Bring in the bad weather and build the tension
Deliver the surprise and resolve the story
